extract: Psychic Fangs (Japanese: サイコファング Psycho Fang) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature move of Bruxish, but other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding. It is: TR97 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM063 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM124 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
